privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target VeraCrypt volume is synthetically created at '/home/ga/Volumes/audit_volume.hc' with a FAT filesystem and password 'SecureAudit2024!'. The volume contains an initial log file named 'audit_log.txt'. The agent is expected to create a robust shell script at '/home/ga/Documents/safe_log_entry.sh' that securely mounts the volume, updates the log, and reliably dismounts it.
